Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group

Interface FlixelBasicGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

Type Parameters:
T - Member type.
All Superinterfaces:
FlixelGroupable<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelBasicGroup, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelState, FlixelSubState
public interface FlixelBasicGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic> extends FlixelGroupable<T>
A FlixelGroupable whose members are FlixelBasic instances. Engine code (overlap checks, debug traversal, FlixelBasicGroup) can depend on this marker and the helpers below without forcing generic FlixelGroup users to extend FlixelBasic.

For lifecycle guidance (kill/revive/destroy), see FlixelBasic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default T
    getFirstDead()
    Returns the first non-null member with exists == false, or null.
    default void
    removeMember(T member, boolean destroy)
    Removes the member from the group; if destroy is true, also calls FlixelBasic.destroy() on it after removal.

    Methods inherited from interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group.FlixelGroupable

    add, clear, detach, forEachMember, forEachMemberType, getFirstNullIndex, getMaxSize, getMembers, remove, setMaxSize

  • Method Details

    • removeMember

      default void removeMember(T member, boolean destroy)
      Removes the member from the group; if destroy is true, also calls FlixelBasic.destroy() on it after removal.
      Parameters:
      member - The member to remove.
      destroy - If true, call FlixelBasic.destroy() after unlinking.

    • getFirstDead

      @Nullable default T getFirstDead()
      Returns the first non-null member with exists == false, or null.
